## Source: ossf-package-analysis (fee26f45917181f84e4c801d2e104b42fccc84e04dae778e5e06de3d5ce863d8)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'eslint-plugin-skyscanner-dates' @ 99.0.2 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
